name: tripwire
description: Privacy-preserving, tamper-evident edge perception agent. On-device screening on a phone; only summaries escalate to Qwen on Alibaba Cloud; every detection is written to a hash-chained, signed local ledger. Built for the Global AI Hackathon Series with Qwen Cloud (EdgeAgent track).

scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @tripwire/shared run typecheck && pnpm --filter @tripwire/edge run typecheck && pnpm --filter @tripwire/server run typecheck
